'''samofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjutor|coadjutor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjutor|coadjutor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| samofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæmefeth|sæmefeth]] || [[word:sæmefej|sæmefej]] || [[word:sæmefesh|sæmefesh]] || [[word:sæmefe|sæmefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:samomofoth|samomofoth]] || [[word:samomofoj|samomofoj]] || [[word:samomofosh|samomofosh]] || [[word:samomofo|samomofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:samofoth|samofoth]] || [[word:samofoj|samofoj]] || [[word:samofosh|samofosh]] || [[word:samofo|samofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:samoffoth|samoffoth]] || [[word:samoffoj|samoffoj]] || [[word:samoffosh|samoffosh]] || [[word:samoffof|samoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:samofotho|samofotho]] || [[word:samofojo|samofojo]] || [[word:samofosho|samofosho]] || [[word:samofoko|samofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:samofoth|samofoth]] || [[word:samofoj|samofoj]] || [[word:samofosh|samofosh]] || [[word:samofo|samofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:samofothol|samofothol]] || [[word:samofojol|samofojol]] || [[word:samofoshol|samofoshol]] || [[word:samofokol|samofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:samofothotho|samofothotho]] || [[word:samofojojo|samofojojo]] || [[word:samofoshosho|samofoshosho]] || [[word:samofoko|samofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:samofothon|samofothon]] || [[word:samofojon|samofojon]] || [[word:samofoshon|samofoshon]] || [[word:samofokon|samofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:samofothoro|samofothoro]] || [[word:samofojoro|samofojoro]] || [[word:samofoshoro|samofoshoro]] || [[word:samofokoro|samofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
